title: tragus alienus
intro: Tragus alienus, a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, is also known as the 'hairy warty barbwire bush' due to its distinctive appearance. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Tragus alienus has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
